title: Software Engineer
summary: Detail-oriented Software Engineer with 5 years of experience developing and maintaining web applications, APIs, and cloud-hosted systems. Skilled in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and Python, with hands-on experience in AWS, CI/CD automation, and Terraform infrastructure management. Passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and delivering user-friendly, scalable solutions. Demonstrated ability to work cross-functionally and thrive in agile, fast-paced environments.

projects.name: Cloud Resume Builder
projects.description: Developed a resume automation tool using React, AWS Lambda, and DynamoDB to dynamically render and store user data.

projects.name: Weather Insight App
projects.description: Built a responsive weather forecasting app with React and OpenWeather API, featuring geolocation-based search and data caching.

professionalExperiences.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed and optimized React and Node.js applications with Material UI, CSS3, and SQL for cloud-monitoring and cost-optimization dashboards.
Implemented REST and GraphQL APIs for data aggregation and analytics, improving API response performance by 30%.
Automated infrastructure provisioning and configuration with Terraform and AWS CloudFormation.
Built CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker, reducing deployment time by 50%.
Collaborated with DevOps and product teams to implement logging, alerting, and monitoring using CloudWatch and Prometheus.
Conducted code reviews, mentored interns, and enforced coding standards with ESLint.

professionalExperiences.title: Web Developer
responsibilities: Built and maintained user-facing web interfaces using React, Redux, and TypeScript.
Collaborated with backend engineers to design RESTful APIs and integrated booking, payment, and listing services.
Implemented responsive UI components with Material UI adhering to WCAG accessibility standards.
Migrated legacy AngularJS modules to React Hooks and Context API.
Participated in CI/CD pipeline setup using Jenkins and Terraform.
Implemented automated end-to-end testing in Cypress.

professionalExperiences.title: Junior Software Developer
responsibilities: Developed full-stack web applications using Django, React, and JavaScript.
Designed relational database schemas and built CRUD APIs with Python and PostgreSQL using SQLAlchemy.
Deployed containerized applications using Docker and authored Bash automation scripts.
Supported development of internal tools to automate QA workflows and improve build reliability.
